rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by aligning type declarations with expression types
Remove guarantees with unresolved references or invalid types
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers in the same annex
Ensure all AGREE scalar types are int, real, or bool
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to only address validator diagnostics
Preserve existing architecture when repairing validator errors
Use concrete bounds or visible relations in assumptions and guarantees
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq helpers for complex expressions in guarantees
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
Use valid AADL feature names in contracts
Ensure all references in contracts are resolvable
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new package-qualified identifiers or types
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references
Do not change unrelated architecture when repairing validator errors
